response.step_by_step_log: The video starts with a title screen and a comic-style intro. At 02:54, a 3D performance begins. On-screen text identified the song title "UNDEAD" and producer "Ayase". I used the search query "UNDEAD YOASOBI Japanese and English lyrics" to find the lyrics, as Ayase is the composer/producer for the YOASOBI project, which performs this song. I extracted the performer "Anya Melfissa" from the hashtag #DetectiveAnya3D and visual recognition.
response.global_summary: The video begins with an introductory comic-style sequence featuring the character Anya Melfissa, followed by a 3D stage performance where she sings the song "UNDEAD" by YOASOBI.

scenes.description: Introductory screen with the title "The Great Ancient Detective's Bizarre Investigation+".
Anya Melfissa wakes from a bad dream in a comic-style sequence.
Anya Melfissa performs "UNDEAD" on a 3D stage with neon visual effects. Song title "UNDEAD" and credits "Lyrics, Music: Ayase" appear on screen.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
(Unhappy?)
悩める人の子よ
(Unlucky?)
人ならざる者も
(Be happy!)
絶えず目指せよ
生きてるんだろ
目を逸らした過去も
退屈な未来も
抱え込んだまま
誰の目も届かない
透明な境界
一度行けれ
一度行き欲の奥
(Undead!)
もういないのに、あれ？
と違いないアイロニー
目透かされているのは今の自分
なんせ急がないで
(Undead!)
言わずもがなコンプレックス
取り繕われているみたい
巻き付いてそのままだ
(Undead!)
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
(Unhappy?)
If you're dealing with a lotta woes
(Unlucky?)
Then you got to listen very close
(Be happy!)
Keep on trying, never give up
(Undead!)
Don't you ever...
(Why does it feel like I'm fighting something?)
(Can't touch, don't want to touch)
The past self, self, self, self
Already dead, confronting transparent ghosts
Painful memories of childhood
Regretful? Even though they're gone
Huh? That's better? How ironic
Is the current self being seen through?
Nonsense...
